'''[[Toola Spaceport]]''' was the main [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] on [[Toola/Legends|Toola]]. [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Noirah Na]] and [[Kai Hudorra]] escaped [[Toola/Legends|Toola]] after [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] by boarding a ship at the spaceport that was destined for [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].

{{Loc-stub}}
